project_type: React + TypeScript digital board game (Rising Sun adaptation)
test_framework: None (no test files found in project)
test_command: npm run build (no test framework - build is the only verification)
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` from the project root. Exit code 0 means success.
environment_constraints: No test framework available. Validation is done via TypeScript compilation (tsc -b && vite build). Build already passes with exit code 0.
key_patterns: Zustand store in src/store/gameStore.ts manages all state. Game logic pure functions in src/utils/gameLogic.ts. UI components in src/components/. i18n with two files src/i18n/en.ts and src/i18n/es.ts with TranslationKey type. CLANS constant has clan colors. Hotseat mode uses gameState.currentPlayerIndex to track whose turn it is.
directory_structure: src/components/ - UI components, src/store/ - Zustand store, src/utils/ - game logic, src/types/ - TypeScript types, src/i18n/ - translations, src/App.css - all styles
